body: Fanshawe College Computer Programmer Analyst, then into industry. QA at PGP Securities in Waterloo, .NET development at Info-Tech Research Group and OASIS Auto Complete in London, then progressively more senior roles.

body: Entry point at Durham in Application Services. Established software engineering best practices — source control, release management, agile methodologies. Oversaw the full SDLC as Technical Lead.

Owned the full SQL Server lifecycle — architecture, implementation, performance, upgrades, HA, administration — across a large portfolio of enterprise environments. Led full-lifecycle application development, managed cross-functional teams of developers, DBAs, and business analysts, and governed all third-party vendor relationships.
milestones: SQL Server HA consolidation onto Always On Availability Groups — 99.9% uptime
Vena buy-vs-build: C# Excel interop POC → recognized maintenance burden → led RFP → Vena procurement
Durham Health DHCP .NET app, SSIS pipelines, SSRS reporting suite
Durham/York Energy from Waste real-time web display
Housing Waitlist system for Social Services

body: Shifted the platform forward — Azure, Medallion Architecture, Databricks, MS Fabric. Led the organization through a major security modernization initiative and championed managed identities, Arc-enabled servers, and hybrid cloud governance.
milestones: INIT transit analytics — Medallion Architecture on Azure Synapse + Databricks; active MS Fabric migration
Security modernization — 81% vulnerability reduction; top 2% Ontario public institutions
Commvault Metallic → Log Analytics backup telemetry pipeline
GIS Azure migration pilot — infra/HA SQL Server for ESRI stack

body: Independent consulting delivering database architecture, data platform engineering, cloud infrastructure, and full-stack development. Serving enterprise and public-sector clients across Simcoe County, the Greater Toronto Area, and beyond.
milestones: Contract engagements in DBA, Solution Architecture, Data Engineering, and .NET development
Targeting roles where architecture depth and platform breadth both contribute
